---
title: "Back-and-Forth Exchanges Boost Children's Brain Response to Language"
description: "The magical power of conversation."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-11-24"
categories: [neuroscience, linguistics, society, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Back-and-forth exchanges boost children's brain response to language. Image from [MIT News](https://news.mit.edu/2018/conversation-boost-childrens-brain-response-language-0214).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

The magical power of conversation.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_back-and-forth-exchanges-boost-childrens-activity-6604240460137529344-6mp0).*
